tagline: A text field plus a calendar popover for picking a single date.
whenToUse: Use for one date where the calendar context helps — a due date, a start date, a delivery day. Dates cross the API as ISO-8601 strings ('2026-07-11'), never Date objects. For a start/end pair use the Date Range Picker; for a time-of-day use the Time Picker; for a plain free-form value with no calendar affordance a native input may be enough.
